parameters.subject: ={{ '🚨 Failed: ' + $json.filename }}
parameters.message:
={{ 'Test file ' + $json.filename + ' failed.
Cases: ' + $json.casesPassed + '/' + $json.casesTotal + ' passed.

Error Details:
' + ($json.stderr || 'No error details') }}

parameters.name: text
parameters.value:
={{ '*' + $json.product + ' Test Suite Summary*

' + '📅 *Date:* ' + $json.timestamp + '
' + '✅ *Test Cases Passed:* ' + $json.passedCases + '
' + '❌ *Test Cases Failed:* ' + $json.failedCases + '
' + '📈 *Total Test Cases:* ' + $json.totalCases + '
' + '📂 *Total Files:* ' + $json.totalFiles + '
' + '🎯 *Success Rate:* ' + $json.successRate + '
' + '⏱️ *Total Duration:* ' + $json.totalDuration + ($json.failedFiles !== 'None' ? '

⚠️ *Failed Files:* ' + $json.failedFiles : '') }}

parameters.subject: ={{ '📊 ' + $json.product + ' Test Summary - ' + $json.successRate }}
parameters.message:
={{ "

📊 " + $json.product + " Test Summary

Date: " + $json.timestamp + "

✅ Test Cases Passed: " + $json.passedCases + "

❌ Test Cases Failed: " + $json.failedCases + "

📈 Total Test Cases: " + $json.totalCases + "

📂 Total Files: " + $json.totalFiles + "

Success Rate: " + $json.successRate + "

Total Duration: " + $json.totalDuration + "

" + ($json.failedFiles !== 'None' ? "

⚠️ Failed Files: " + $json.failedFiles + "

" : "") + "" }}
